_comment: Reference copy of the Claude Code wiring. It is already registered via `claude mcp add` (see README). The bash wrapper loads your keys from razorpay_mcp/.env at runtime, so no secrets live in this file.

args: set -a; source /Users/ashi.jain/Documents/project_deal/razorpay_mcp/.env; set +a; exec docker run --rm -i -e RAZORPAY_KEY_ID -e RAZORPAY_KEY_SECRET razorpay/mcp
